Flow.description: After-save async flow on Program. Fires when nepa_gis_proximity_complete__c changes to true. Queries nepa_detected_protection_layer__c records where nepa_is_hit__c = true, resolves unique disciplines from NEPA_Layer_Discipline__mdt, finds matching ServiceResource by nepa_discipline__c, bulk-creates nepa_process_team_member__c records, and invokes NEPA_Work_Order_Generator to create field-survey Work Orders per discipline. On re-run, deactivates existing auto-assembled team members and cancels auto-generated Work Orders before re-assembling. CMT-driven: adding a new layer/discipline requires only a NEPA_Layer_Discipline__mdt record — no flow changes.
Flow.label: NEPA Team Assembly Orchestrator

value.stringValue: GIS Complete — No Active NEPA Process Found

GIS proximity check completed but no active IndividualApplication (NEPA Process) was found linked to this project. Create an IndividualApplication and set nepa_related_project__c to this Program to enable automated team assembly and Work Order creation.

loops.name: Loop_DeactivateExistingMembers
loops.label: Loop: Stamp Deactivation on Existing Members

loops.name: Loop_CancelExistingWOs
loops.label: Loop: Stamp Cancelled on Auto WOs

recordCreates.name: Create_NoHitsTask
recordCreates.label: Create No GIS Hits Info Task

value.stringValue: GIS Complete — No Protection Layer Hits Detected

GIS proximity check completed with no protection layer hits. No specialist team assembly or Work Orders were required. If the project location is correct, no further action is needed. If you believe hits should have been detected, verify the project coordinates and the NEPA_GIS_Layer__mdt buffer distance configurations.

recordLookups.name: GetAllLayerDisciplines
recordLookups.label: Get All Active Layer Discipline CMT Records

loops.name: Loop_MatchCMTForLayer
loops.label: Loop: Find CMT Match for Current Layer

decisions.name: Decision_DisciplinesFound
decisions.label: Any Discipline Pairs Matched?
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No CMT Matches — Log and End

recordCreates.name: Create_NoCMTMatchTask
recordCreates.label: Create No CMT Match Alert Task

value.stringValue: Team Assembly: No NEPA_Layer_Discipline__mdt Entries Match Detected Layers

GIS proximity detected protection layers but no matching NEPA_Layer_Discipline__mdt records were found for those layer DeveloperNames. Add NEPA_Layer_Discipline__mdt records matching the layer DeveloperNames and re-run the GIS check to trigger team assembly.

loops.name: Loop_FindServiceResources
loops.label: Loop: Find ServiceResource for Each Discipline

value.stringValue: Team Assembly: Manual Assignment Required for Unmatched Disciplines

One or more specialist disciplines required for GIS-detected protection layers could not be matched to an active ServiceResource. Manual team assignment is required. Verify that ServiceResource records exist with matching nepa_discipline__c values for all NEPA_Layer_Discipline__mdt Discipline__c entries.
NEPA Team Assembly Error — Manual Review Required
